User.title: User
User.description: Student or Admin profile containing role-based authorization details and custom bio info

uid.description: Unique user credentials identifier from Firebase Auth

name.description: Full name of the student or administrator

role.description: Access control role assigned to user

photoURL.description: Profile picture URL for the student or admin

Test.title: Test
Test.description: Metadata regarding computer certificates preparation assessments like CCC test

id.description: Document ID of this trial assessment

timeLimit.description: Allocated timer per question, default is 10

questionsCount.description: Total count of multiple choice questions included

Question.title: Question
Question.description: Individual question structure for a mock practice test

id.description: Document ID or index of this question

question.description: Content of the computer assessment question

options.description: Four options for multiple choice answers

correctAnswer.description: Strictly matching string of correct option

Result.title: Result
Result.description: Completed quiz attempt metadata indicating student grades and scores summary

id.description: Auto-incrementing or unique test attempt ID

studentId.description: ID of the student completing the test

studentName.description: Full display name of the student

testId.description: Reference ID to corresponding Test object

percentage.description: Correct questions to total questions ratio

motivationalMessage.description: Customized motivational tip based on percentage

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Live computer class announcements or general notifications published by admins

LiveClass.title: LiveClass
LiveClass.description: Active live class links or streaming info set up by the administrative head

id.description: Unique key matching active live schedules

title.description: Topic or title of the electronic class

isActive.description: Whether class is currently live to enter

/users/{userId}.description: Core users list with customized profile specifications

/tests/{testId}.description: CCC computer institute Mock Series list

/tests/{testId}/questions/{questionId}.description: Subcollection holding questions specifically mapped under each individual test template

/results/{resultId}.description: Performance history list with analytics records

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Public system announcements published to student centers
